summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Night City Assistant - Cyberpunk 2077 AI gaming companion. All core functionality working correctly including backend APIs, frontend UI, and full image analysis workflow.
passed_tests: Backend GET /api/ returns success response with correct message
Backend POST /api/analyze accepts base64 images and returns Russian hints
Frontend renders dark cyberpunk UI with glitch title effect
Camera input exists and is clickable (data-testid='camera-input')
Gallery input exists and is clickable (data-testid='gallery-input')
Settings dialog shows system information (Claude Sonnet 4, Neural Link Active)
Image upload shows preview and Get Hint button
Get Hint button sends request, shows loading animation, and displays Russian response
Try Again button available for re-analysis
Clear image button returns to initial state
Made with Emergent badge is properly hidden via CSS
Full end-to-end image analysis workflow functional
AI responses are in Russian using Cyberpunk 2077 knowledge base
Loading states and animations work correctly
Cyberpunk styling with neon yellow accents and grid background
